columnSortJql.summary: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY summary ASC, created DESC
columnSortJql.creator: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY creator DESC, created DESC
columnSortJql.issuekey: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY key ASC, created DESC
columnSortJql.customfield_10119: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY cf[10119] ASC, created DESC

columnSortJql.project: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY project ASC, created DESC
columnSortJql.customfield_11919: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY cf[11919] ASC, created DESC
columnSortJql.issuelinks: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY issuelinks, created DESC
columnSortJql.assignee: project = UPESN AND issuetype = 支持问题 AND (领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 11001) OR 领域模块 in cascadeOption(10707, 10710)) AND status = 支持确认完成 OR issueKey = UPESN-415894 ORDER BY assignee ASC, created DESC
